MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 25, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed motion by Counsel Scott R. Montgomery, Jillian C. Hipschman and Abbey, Weitzberg, Warren & Emery, P.C., counsel for Plaintiff Mahdi Arfa, to be relieved as counsel is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

No later than the time set for hearing, Moving Parties must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org an updated proposed order on MC-053 with accurate information inserted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
